item.title: NSSS Event
item.description:
An invitation to all students interested in careers in national security to join the Director-General of [SEC=CLASSIFIED] for smoked brisket and cornbread.


South Oval, ANU.

March 30, 2024. 6 pm.

Only Australian Citizens and Permanent Residents need/may apply.

https://hereis.alink.edu.au/click/it
item.guid: Upcoming/2024/03/NSSS West Texas Barbeque For Security Practitioners.md
item.dc:creator: tyael
